ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "city_type" TEXT /* Type of city (e.g., metropolitan, rural) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* County seat (i.e., the administrative center) of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic dataset */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the data pertains to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the city's residents */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Median household income in the city */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of racial and ethnic groups in the city */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education of the city's residents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic dataset */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the data pertains to */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the city */,
  "GDP" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) for the city */,
  "industry_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of industries in the city (e.g., manufacturing, services) */,
  "average_house_price" REAL /* Average house price in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("econ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime dataset */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the data pertains to */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of violent crimes per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of property crimes per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the district is located in */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "school_ranking" REAL /* Ranking of the school district (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_districts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment opportunity */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the opportunity is located in */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., real estate, infrastructure) */,
  "projected_return" REAL /* Projected return on investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_opportunities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the trend pertains to */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., population growth, economic growth) */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of growth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
